flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Northwestern Ohio rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.6k → $13.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Northwestern Ohio fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Northwestern Ohio rose 64% between 2006 and 2009 (36.9% → 60.6%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Northwestern Ohio fell 16% between 2017 and 2020 ($20.5k → $17.1k).
